name: SOMAR Corporation
summary: SOMAR Corporation manufactures and trades in chemical materials in Japan and internationally. The company offers films and SMD/sealing materials for use in circuit boards; high functional films, outer protection/moisture-proof materials, and related materials for use in electric/electronic parts; and high light-shading/non-light reflection films for use in optical instruments. It also provides insulation materials for motors, as well as sealing materials for electronic control devices that are used in automotive electric/electronic parts; ink-jet printing films and large copy machine printing films for sign/graphic designs; and slime control agents, preservatives, and water retention aids for use in the paper manufacturing. In addition, the company offers food ingredients, such as thickeners or stabilizers; dehydrated onions, garlic, and vegetables; adhesive/ weak adhesive, UV releasing, and thermal expansion releasing films; high heat-resistant electrical insulation materials; resins for electronic parts, and motors/electronic components; black and ppc films; nonwoven fabric cloth; and cleaning agents. The company was formerly known as Marusho Industrial Co., Ltd. and changed its name to SOMAR Corporation in 1984. SOMAR Corporation was founded in 1948 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
